name: Lease Renewal Prefill
description: Leasing extracts current lease facts, drafts renewal packet details, and waits on owner approval before release.

stages.name: Extract Current Lease
stages.description: Turn lease/source data into structured renewal facts.

steps.title: Extract current lease terms
steps.instructions: Extract tenants, emails, property, current rent, expiry date, deposits, and renewal constraints. Include confidence fields.
steps.dispatch_body: Extract structured current lease terms for renewal drafting. Do not send documents.

steps.title: Verify extracted terms
steps.instructions: Review low-confidence fields and correct anything needed before the renewal draft.
steps.human_prompt: Verify extracted renewal facts before Leasing drafts the packet.

stages.name: Draft Renewal Packet
stages.description: Create an explainable draft packet for owner review.

steps.title: Draft renewal summary
steps.instructions: Draft the renewal summary with proposed terms and explainable line items. No owner/resident send.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft the renewal summary and document packet details; no outbound send.

steps.title: Owner reply gate
steps.instructions: Do not complete until owner has replied with approve/edit/decline.
steps.human_prompt: Owner approval required before renewal packet release.

stages.name: Release Approved Renewal
stages.description: Prepare approved packet and track signatures.

steps.title: Prepare approved packet
steps.instructions: Prepare the approved packet and signature checklist. Keep release gated to the configured document-send approval path.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare approved renewal packet details and signature checklist; do not bypass send approval.

steps.title: Track signature status
steps.instructions: Track signature status and blockers until renewal is fully executed or escalated.
steps.dispatch_body: Track signatures and blockers for the approved renewal.
